issues.description: Missing required condition: LeaderHasType 'GERMA'. Card text states 'If your Leader's type includes GERMA'.

SearchDeck action incomplete. Must specify: look at top 5 cards, filter for type 'GERMA', reveal up to 1, add to hand, then place rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current filter is 'Any' with no depth/ordering logic.
Filter should target cards with type including 'GERMA', not 'Any'.
